title: Awakening Knight
overview: Rebellion broke out in the peaceful kingdom of Carmon. Princess Sena escapes from the castle of Posca and finds Kate, the only legendary knight who will defeat the traitor, Destro. But the person Sena met was a red-headed Jin with rusty kite's Monsword.

title: Track On!
overview: After searching for Sena, Jin finds Sena caught by Mark's gang. The moment Jin tries to save Sena, the legendary monster Draka wakes up in Monsword.

title: The Return of Michael
overview: Jin and Draka are becoming more and more friendly. One day, Jin's old friend Michael appears in Latona Town. He returned home after losing the game against the mysterious man. Jin asks Michael for a Monkart showdown.

title: Friendly Rivalry
overview: Michael refused to play against Jin, but he ended up playing Monkart. Despite Leo's fast speed, Draka is also fast. Jin got lost, however built a storng bond with Draka. Jin and Michael decide to compete again in the future.

title: Finding the Monkart Expert
overview: Jin heads to the mountains to meet an unidentified Monkart master whom Michael told him and meets Kubi and Moncha. Kubi steals Jin's Monsword and runs away.

title: Monkart Expert in Disguise
overview: A group of Jins back to town Jin takes Mark's challenge for Monkart and heads to the circuit. Mark introduces himself to a master of Monkart competitions: Cubby and Moncha.

title: The Seed of Auobyss
overview: Zero is bitten by the power of darkness by the seed of the wizard Aubis.

title: Saving Zero
overview: Jin wins the Monkart race and returns Zero to his original form.

title: An Imminent Threat
overview: Isabel kidnaps and interrogates Kubi. Mark is looking for a monster to replace Bucky. Bucky is imbued with the power of darkness by the seed of Aubis.

title: The Rage of Buckie
overview: Jin wins Mark and the match, and returns Bucky to his original state. Sena bumps into Isabel.

title: The Secret of Sena
overview: Sena informs Jin of Destro's plan and Jin got shocked.

title: Toward the Knight!
overview: Jin hears that his father is Kate. Sena chased by Isabel and gets on the train with Jin.

title: The First Tournament
overview: Jin arrived in Leiflower Town and participate in the official Monkart competition.

title: The Queen of Reflower
overview: Veth loses to Megariod Vesper in the official Monkart competition.

title: The Secret of the Gemstone
overview: Draka head to Wigrasil in the middle of the night. The golden flower tells the background of Ellie having Gemstone.

title: Ellie in Darkness
overview: Pixie reveals Aubis' strength in the semi-final at the Monkart race.

title: Pixie's Will
overview: Jin is told by Bibi that Pixie accepted the seeds of the Aubis given by Petel because he wanted to be strong.

title: Megaroid, Transform!
overview: The final match of the Monkart race between Jin and Ellie. Draka turns into a megariod. With Jin's victory, Pixie returns to her original form.

title: The Mysterious Ghostia Town
overview: Jin meets Louie and Lancelot. Louis goes out to defeat the Ghost Rider.

title: The Ghost Rider
overview: Nickel, who studies magic, tries to defeat the Ghost Rider.

title: A Knight's Duty
overview: Nickel said the Ghost Rider was his dead monster Triki. Jin and Louie play a showdown and decide who will deal with the Ghost Rider.

title: The Return of Trickie
overview: Triki on the circuit. Nickel sheds tears of emotion as Triki is alive. Draka, Lancelot and Triki join forces to compete against the Ghost Rider.

title: The Fog Maze
overview: Vade and Dante try to lock up the maze of mist, but Ruth appears and destroys it.

title: Ellie's Betrayal
overview: Vade and Dante kidnap Sena. Jin plays Monkart race against Vade to rescue Sena.

title: Maze Showdown
overview: Jin and Draka win against Dante. Players and monsters who have been trapped in the maze of mist get out.

title: Prince of Darkness
overview: Vade and Dante return the pendant to Sena. The Petel that appeared then shows Larken's strength.

title: Where the Wind Blows
overview: Upon arrival at Sky Valley, the Jin group meets Ridine. Jin participates in the Wind Cup.

title: Wings of the Wind
overview: Jin loses against Ridine. Ridine is said to use the force of the wind.

title: Reading the Wind
overview: Jin and Draka train to be protected by Sylp.

title: The White Brothers
overview: Robin got the protect by Sylp. Each participant have a Wind Cup qualifier and the list of finalists made in public.

title: The Girl in the Dark
overview: The blind girl Dennis is using the power of Aubis. Destro orders Isabel to plant the seed of truth in Draka.

title: Varret's Wish
overview: Berret accepts the seeds of Aubis for Dennis' victory, but with the victory of Jin and Draca, Barret returns to his original state.

title: Evolution Z
overview: Jin and Michael face Petel together, but they are troubled by the strength of the Petel.

title: The Seed of Truth
overview: In the Wind Cup final, Isabel shoots the seeds of truth at Draka then Draka became violent.

title: At the End of the Rampage
overview: Draka being out of control. But with Lucy's power, she returns Draka to its original state.

title: The Boy of the Bamboo Forest
overview: Jin group head to Bambu Town and meet Chen. Kate's disciple, Chen, decides to help Jin.

title: Special Training, Again and Again
overview: Jin and Draka train. Isabel, meanwhile, trapped in jail.

title: Evolution Z, Draburst!
overview: Draka evolve into Draburst. Jin gets to the master grade and heads to Posca City.

title: To Posca Castle
overview: In Posca City, Jin is reunited with Louis, Michael and Ridine. The Posca Grand Prix will open and the winner will marry Sena.

title: The Grand Prix Begins!
overview: Eight players will compete, and Destro points to Jin against the match. But Jin gets defeat.

title: Hearts in Resonance
overview: Jin and Laura are surrounded by Angela and Ravi. Ravi receives the seeds of Aubis and being out of control.

title: Fire Against Fire
overview: With Jin's victory, Angela and Ravi return to their original form.

title: Louis' Crisis
overview: Louis trains by looking at the notes left by his father, but continues to fail to evolve. Meanwhile, Aubis wakes up Boomstar.

title: A Knight's Honor
overview: Jin and Louie will play the semi-finals. At this time, Destro suddenly starts Boom Star. Louis evolves Lancelot into Lance Arthur and saves Draka

title: Into Posca Castle
overview: The Jin Group heads to the dungeon to save Isabel. In there, he meets a stone-turned-king and a queen.

title: An Epic Race! Vettel vs Michael
overview: A semifinal match between Michael and Petel. Petel wins.

title: Into the Final Round of Posca Grand Prix
overview: Isabel escapes from the dungeon with Kubi. And the final match began.

title: The Final Race! Jin vs Vettel
overview: Aubis forces Larken to open up it's hidden power. Jin barely wins.

title: The Title Match
overview: Jin prepare for the final match.

title: The Power of Revenge
overview: Destro kills Kate. Jin eventually defeat the Caios. At this time, black energy escapes from the Monkart of the Caios and turns into a giant dark dragon.

title: Apollyon the Fall
overview: The Jin group fights against the dark dragon Apolion.

title: In the Name of the Knight
overview: Jin fights and wins the Apolion and seals the Apolion. The king and queen were released by magic and returned to their original state.
